metadata.description: A portable Agent Skill that bumps a Maven project one Java LTS step (8->11, 11->17, 17->21, 21->25), conserving previously-passing tests, using only standard tools.

plugins.name: bump-java-version
plugins.description: Migrate a Maven project one Java LTS step (8->11, 11->17, 17->21, 21->25) so it compiles under the new JDK and previously-passing tests still pass — JDKs, Maven, and OpenRewrite recipes from Maven Central only, no project-specific scripts.
